category_sources: source_facts.description says Microsoft Windows password cracker using rainbow tables; official website describes Ophcrack as a free Windows password cracker based on rainbow tables.
display_name_sources: Official ophcrack.sourceforge.io site uses "ophcrack"; conventional project display name is "Ophcrack".
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project wiki is labeled Documentation with Howto/FAQ links; official homepage is the main product information surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge download points to source releases, and search results identify Objectif Securite/ophcrack on GitLab as the moved source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Windows password cracking and rainbow tables; official homepage lists LM/NTLM hashes, audit mode, brute-force module, and command-line availability.
